draft.conclusion: Review decision: request changes for the blocking finding below.

findings.problem: The patch trusts x-middleware-subrequest read straight from the incoming request. x-middleware-subrequest 伪造 外部 头 client header spoof header 绕过 鉴权 bypass auth
findings.evidence: x-middleware-subrequest is an ordinary request header; an unauthenticated external request can set it and hit the early-return, skipping the middleware that protects /admin, /billing and /settings. x-middleware-subrequest unauthenticated
findings.impact: x-middleware-subrequest is an ordinary request header; an unauthenticated external request can set it and hit the early-return, skipping the middleware that protects /admin, /billing and /settings. x-middleware-subrequest unauthenticated
findings.fix: Do not trust this header inside app middleware; upgrade Next.js to a fixed version and strip/reject internal headers at the edge or reverse proxy, plus re-check authorization in route handlers. authorization middleware

draft.tests: The new test only proves the early-return branch exists; it never asserts a spoofed request is blocked. The test sets the header and expects a 200. It does not assert that an unauthenticated request to /admin carrying a forged x-middleware-subrequest is still redirected/blocked, so the dangerous path stays green. 测试 未登录 测试 伪造 test spoof test unauthenticated 测试 拦截
